prompt_used: Story: Black Chapel Ledger (black-chapel-ledger) | Hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money. | Subgenre: gothic horror | Tone: EERIE | Location: Cliffside cathedral archive district | Villain: The Creditor | Villain worldview: Every truth must be paid for, and mercy is fraud. | Motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax.
